name: Elgato Stream Deck
description: Configuration software for Elgato Stream Deck hardware control surfaces

extraction.note: Both Automatic and Manual blocks contain the same Version field

release_date.note: Use HTTP Last-Modified header on app-version-check.json as proxy

notes: JSON version endpoint works without authentication. Separate automatic and manual update channels, but versions are identical. Also has app-download-automatic.php and app-download-manual.php redirect endpoints.
